## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve?

## Proposed change

Describe the behavior you want.

## Why this fits jot

Explain why this belongs in jot specifically and how it fits the product.

## Alternatives considered

Describe any workarounds or alternative approaches you considered.

## Additional context

Anything else that would help evaluate the request.
